title: Biomes O' Plenty Nether BGM
description: Brings the music from Biomes O' Plenty to the Nether in vanilla.
body:
This pack takes the music that plays as part of the Biomes O' Plenty mod and adds it to the vanilla Nether music playlist, unmodified from the jar. It also supports the music toasts feature. 

**_As of v1.0.1, music toasts now display the artist info that was provided by the original mod._**

![A player in the Nether dimension (vanilla), with a music toast on the top left. It reads "LudoCrypt - Cortisol (Biomes O' Plenty)", which is a music track exclusive to the Biomes O' Plenty mod.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aUObLJF6/images/50786170af965b6152c811c0d3ab1a9856fe4f85.png)
